name: Soofganiyak (Fried Fruit Cookies)
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together flour, salt, sugar, baking powder, cinnamon, and nutmeg.
2. Beat eggs, oil, and fruit juice (raspberry juice is great, apple juice will do) until smooth. Add to the flour mixture and stir to form a soft dough. Form dough into flat cakes (about 3 dozen).
3. Place half a teaspoon of jelly (raspberry is wonderful, but any jelly or jam can be used) in the center of each cake.
4. Roll dough over the jelly to cover it, forming a ball.
5. Deep-fry balls in hot oil (380F) for 4-5 minutes.
6. Drain on paper towels.
7. Dust with powdered sugar.
